caller_config.derivation: frequency threshold raised from 0.1→0.75 for haploid fixed-mutation calling; quality-weighted base frequencies using per-base Phred scores (P_correct = 1 - 10^(-Q/10)); strand bias filter requiring ≥10% reads on minor strand; pileup base quality filter at Q20 excluding bases with >1% error probability

pileup_config.derivation: Phred Q20 = 1% error rate. Bases below this threshold excluded from counts before variant calling. Matches breseq default base quality trimming.

REL1164M.note: 78 vs previous 34000 (99.8% FP reduction). 0 position overlap with breseq — remaining 78 likely mapping artifacts in repetitive regions. breseq 4 are true fixed mutations not yet recovered.

computation.substrate: CPU mapping + GPU pileup scan + GPU SNP calling
